All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
ApiHandler
Handler for a single API route registered by a service module.
ApiParam
Describes a single parameter of an API route.
ApiRequest
Inbound API HTTP request, stripped of HTTP-transport details.
ApiResponse
Response produced by a module API handler.
ApiRouteRegistrar
Passed to CloudMockApiService.registerRoutes(io.cloudmock.core.spi.restapi.CloudMockApiContext) so modules can declare API routes without depending on any HTTP transport type.
ApiServer
Lightweight REST API server for standalone mode.
AppendLogStateStore
Persistent StateStore that records each mutation as a single appended record in an append-only log, rather than rewriting the whole document on every change.
AwsEndpointOverride
Manages the aws.endpoint-url system property that redirects AWS SDK v2 traffic to the embedded mock server.
CloudMock
Entry point for the CloudMock framework.
CloudMockAlreadyStartedException
 
CloudMockApiContext
Passed to CloudMockApiService.registerRoutes(io.cloudmock.core.spi.restapi.CloudMockApiContext) at API-server startup.
CloudMockApiService
Optional companion to CloudMockService for modules that want to expose API routes under /api/<serviceId>/….
CloudMockContext
Passed to CloudMockService.register(CloudMockContext) at startup.
CloudMockContextImpl
 
CloudMockExtension
JUnit extension (JUnit 5 and 6) that manages the CloudMock lifecycle around a test class and applies fault injection annotations (SimulateThrottle, SimulateTimeout, SimulateNetworkBrownout) to individual test methods.
CloudMockNotStartedException
 
CloudMockResponseTransformer
The single global response transformer: it produces a matched stub's real response — running its module-supplied StubHandler against the shared StateStore when the stub is stateful — and then applies any active fault for the stub's service as a decoration over that response.
CloudMockS3ApiService
REST API surface for S3, mounted under /api/s3/….
CloudMockS3Service
CloudMock service module for S3.
CloudMockSecretsManagerApiService
REST API surface for Secrets Manager, mounted under /api/secretsmanager/….
CloudMockSecretsManagerService
CloudMock service module for AWS Secrets Manager.
CloudMockService
Entry point that every CloudMock service module must implement.
CloudMockSettings
Mutable holder for all pre-start configuration of a CloudMock instance.
CloudMockSNSService
CloudMock service module for SNS.
CloudMockSqsApiService
REST API surface for SQS, mounted under /api/sqs/….
CloudMockSqsService
CloudMock service module for Amazon SQS.
CloudMockStateException
Thrown when the persistent state store cannot read or write its backing file.
CloudMockV1Endpoints
Helper for pointing AWS SDK v1 clients at a running CloudMock instance.
FaultEngine
Records the active fault, if any, for each service.
FaultInjectionExtension
Standalone JUnit 6 extension that applies fault injection annotations to test methods.
GeneratedFile
A single file produced by the generator: a path relative to the module root and its content.
GenerationResult
The outcome of a single model generation run.
HttpMethod
HTTP methods used to match REST-style stubs via StubRegistrar.registerRestStub(io.cloudmock.core.spi.HttpMethod, java.lang.String, java.lang.String).
InMemoryStateStore
Thread-safe in-memory StateStore.
JsonFileStateStore
Persistent StateStore that serialises state to a JSON file on every mutation.
Main
Entry point for the CloudMock stub code generator.
Md5HandlebarsHelper
WireMock extension that registers a {{md5 value}} Handlebars helper.
ModelResolver
 
ModuleGenerator
Generates a complete, compilable cloudmock-* module skeleton from a Smithy service model.
ModuleInitializer
Discovers and registers all CloudMockService modules against a running server.
ModuleStatus
Status snapshot for one loaded service module and its registered stubs.
RequestHistory
Read/clear view over the WireMock request journal, translated into CloudMock's RequestRecord domain model.
RequestRecord
Immutable snapshot of a single request served by the mock engine.
ServiceRegistry
Records which stubs each service module registered, so CloudMockResponseTransformer can look up a matched stub's protocol when decorating its response with a fault, without coupling to the module's implementation.
SimulateNetworkBrownout
Causes approximately rate fraction of requests to the named service to fail with a connection reset; the remainder are served normally.
SimulateNetworkBrownout.List
 
SimulateThrottle
Causes all stubs for the named service to return a ThrottlingException (HTTP 400) for the duration of the annotated test method.
SimulateThrottle.List
 
SimulateTimeout
Causes all stubs for the named service to delay their response beyond the AWS SDK's call timeout, triggering a timeout exception at the SDK level.
SimulateTimeout.List
 
StandaloneMain
 
StatePersistence
Selects the persistent StateStore backend used when a store directory is configured via CloudMock.withStoreDirectory(java.nio.file.Path).
StateStore
Shared key-value backend owned and lifecycle-managed by the core engine.
StateStoreFactory
Chooses the StateStore implementation for a CloudMock instance: a persistent store of the requested StatePersistence backend when a directory is configured, otherwise a throwaway in-memory store.
StubHandler
A request-time handler for a stateful stub.
StubInfo
Describes a single registered stub: its protocol and match key.
StubRegistrar
Facade through which service modules register HTTP stubs without any direct dependency on the underlying networking driver (WireMock).
StubRequest
Read-only view of an incoming HTTP request, handed to a StubHandler at request time.
StubResponse
Immutable HTTP response returned by a StubHandler.
WireMockServerFactory
Builds and starts the embedded WireMock server from CloudMockSettings.
WireMockStubRegistrar
Internal StubRegistrar implementation that delegates to a live WireMock server.
